opening_frame.description: A sun-dappled park view through a row of tall, mature trees, with a modern white building visible in the background. A paved path runs horizontally in the foreground, bordered by grass and tree trunks.

visual.subject: Urban park street scene with passing traffic
visual.action: Continuous flow of various vehicles (cars, vans, trucks, buses) driving from left to right on a road behind the trees.
visual.environment: A sunny urban park with lush green trees, a paved walking path, a street with moving traffic, and a modern white building in the background.
visual.style: Naturalistic, observational, high-contrast daylight with strong shadows from tree canopy.
visual.camera: Static, eye-level, medium-wide shot from a fixed position within the park.
visual.composition: Foreground path and grass, mid-ground tree trunks creating vertical rhythm, background road and building. Traffic movement is horizontally framed between trees.
visual.ambiance: Peaceful, shaded park contrasting with busy urban traffic movement.

audio.sfx: Continuous sound of passing vehicles (engine hum, tire noise, varying vehicle types).
audio.ambient: Birdsong, distant city hum, gentle wind through leaves.
